nodes.name: Combine DB Result with Order Data

parameters.query:
SELECT
    chat_id,
    store_id,
    order_details_json,
    final_order_total
FROM
    n8n.pending_orders
WHERE
    order_id = '{{ $json.query.razorpay_payment_link_reference_id }}'
    AND status = 'pending_payment';
